title: Gateway downward SRH for non-storing RPL
description: Analyze and update Gateway::mesh_to_mesh in lichen-gateway to use lookup_route from lichen-rpl/lichen-node Router to insert SourceRoutingHeader (or via add_rpl_source_route) before SCHC compress for downward traffic from upstream or mesh-to-mesh forwarding, per spec/05-routing.md:147 and draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md:7.4. Update related tests, check TxQueue integration. Break into issues for parse/lookup/build/compress/error handling.
